title: Moving folder to workspaces

posts.author: TraceyParker (Tracey Parker)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am experiencing a couple of issues with Monday.com that I need assistance with:

  1. Moving Boards to the Correct Workspace:

I can create the new board from my Templates, but when I try to move it to the correct workspace, nothing populates in the “Choose Workspace” search bar. When I enter a workspace name, it shows “No results found.” As a result, I am unable to move the board out of the Template folder and into the desired workspace.

image736×374 89.3 KB

  1. Creating New Folders:

I am also unable to create new folders within Monday.com. I have attached screenshots to help illustrate the issue.

image564×494 74 KB

Additionally, until this issue is resolved, I am unable to link our SharePoint to the Monday.com folders. Any links inserted into the boards may be broken due to the current workspace issue, so I am unable to finalise the linking process for our team.

For context, I am an Admin on these boards and have been managing them for some time now. Given this, I am confident that the issue is not related to permissions or settings on my end.

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TraceyParker Love the images to help clarify the issue you are facing. I would i looks like a permissions issue. I know they have rolled out new permissions that could be imacting it.

Could another user have made it a closed workspace or changed the workspace settings perhaps for owners?

image698×638 39.3 KB

Its strange when ypu click the move to “Workspace” no options show

image399×184 12 KB

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: Try clearing your cache or using a different browser. Sometimes it helps with weird UI issues.

posts.author: TraceyParker (Tracey Parker)
posts.cookedHtml: @Clarey many thanks for this starting point. I have our Accounts team looking into this

posts.author: TraceyParker (Tracey Parker)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @Karmon, I tried this but still the same issues.
